news.t: Market Extra: AMC Entertainment's stock surge ripples through these ETFs
ETF Investing: 3 ETFs for the reopening trade
Disney shares surge nearly 10%, and some ETFs go along for the ride

holdings.infoBox: SFYF is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 9.54%, NVIDIA at 7.69%, Amazon.com at 7.12%, Berkshire Hathaway at 4.33%, and Micron Technology at 4.17%.

overview.description: The SoFi Social 50 ETF (SFYF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SoFi Social 50 index. The fund tracks an index of 50 US listed stocks most widely held in self-directed brokerage accounts of SoFi Securities based on highest weighted average value. SFYF was launched on May 8, 2019 and is issued by SoFi.

data.title: Market Extra: AMC Entertainment's stock surge ripples through these ETFs
data.text: Shares of AMC Entertainment Holdings are locked in an unprecedented year-to-date rally that has the movie chain's shares up over 2,300% in 2021, and the surge has a batch of exchange-traded funds on f...

data.title: ETF Investing: 3 ETFs for the reopening trade
data.text: Here are three exchange-traded funds that will help investors take advantage of a rush back to travel and leisure stocks that have been left behind in the COVID-19 pandemic of 2020.

data.title: Disney shares surge nearly 10%, and some ETFs go along for the ride
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with big holdings in Walt Disney Co. DIS, +9.91% jumped Wednesday, with some adding to gains that put them on track for their best week in over a month.
